runTitle: v8.12.17 production targeted QA - AI v8.12.16 follow-up closure
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production /api/version reports v8.12.17 with commit b2f6ccf11a86076e96bca4e5a7daba0b4e4a4f70 and GitLab tag pipeline 2548270166
Vercel production /api/health reports healthy database/cache/AI services
GitLab main validate pipeline 2548270161 success for release commit
GitLab v8.12.17 tag deploy/smoke pipeline 2548270166 success
Playwright CLI production AI direct-message smoke: tests/e2e/dashboard-ai-chat.spec.ts direct input case passed
AI Chat: Advisor server performance improvement query returns non-empty actionable response
AI Chat: healthy-only 정상 범위 서버 목록 query returns server list without compact markdown heading leak
AI Chat: lowest composite-load query returns a grounded server answer
AI Chat: available server TOP 3 query returns ranked top-three style answer
skippedSurfaces: AI starter prompt button path: existing E2E selector button[data-prompt-title="서버 상태 확인"] did not match production DOM; direct input AI path covered changed surface instead.
P4 session context continuity: documented as high-complexity follow-up, not included in v8.12.17 P1-P3 closure.
Vision real-image QA: skipped per manual-only policy because Vision routing/provider behavior was not changed.

expertAssessments.rationale: v8.12.16에서 실패한 P1 Advisor, P2 healthy-only/markdown, P3 lowest-load/TOP3 surfaces were retested on production v8.12.17 and passed through real Playwright CLI browser flow.
Main validate pipeline 2548270161, tag deploy/smoke pipeline 2548270166, /api/version, /api/health, and Vercel usage all passed after canonical GitLab release.

Playwright MCP browser actions timed out in the Codex session and the existing starter prompt E2E still depends on a production-missing data-prompt-title selector, although the direct input product path passed.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Stabilize the starter prompt E2E selector with role/text fallback and recheck MCP action reliability in a fresh Codex session.

usageChecks.summary: npm run check:usage:vercel PASS. Current billing period effective 15.3081 USD, billed 0.0000 USD; no unexpected billed usage observed.

artifactDebt.reason: This targeted counted run used Playwright CLI pass/fail output, GitLab pipeline URLs, Vercel version/health JSON, and Vercel usage CLI evidence rather than durable screenshot artifacts.

completedImprovements.title: Advisor performance-improvement query should route to Advisor and return non-empty guidance
completedImprovements.evidence: Production v8.12.17 targeted Playwright CLI asked 'api-was-dc1-01 서버 성능 개선 조언 해줘' and received non-empty actionable response.

completedImprovements.title: Healthy-only server filter should resolve to deterministic evidence
completedImprovements.evidence: Production v8.12.17 targeted Playwright CLI asked '현재 정상 범위인 서버 목록 보여줘' and received a server list.

completedImprovements.title: Compact markdown headings should not leak as raw ##/### text
completedImprovements.evidence: Production v8.12.17 healthy-list answer did not expose raw compact heading text such as ##정상서버목록 or ###CPU사용률.

completedImprovements.title: Lowest-load and available-server TOP-N queries should use grounded ranking
completedImprovements.evidence: Production v8.12.17 targeted Playwright CLI asked '지금 부하가 가장 낮은 서버는?' and '여유 있는 서버 TOP 3 보여줘'; both returned ranked/grounded server answers.

notes: Playwright MCP attempt was made first but browser_click/browser_evaluate actions timed out and reset to about:blank; Playwright CLI fallback was used against the same Vercel production URL.

Existing dashboard-ai-chat.spec direct input case passed; starter prompt case failed because production DOM did not expose button[data-prompt-title="서버 상태 확인"], which is recorded as a test automation gap rather than a product regression for this release.
Local validation before release included AI Engine targeted supervisor-mode test with CI=true, AI Engine type-check, and AI Engine full test 139 files / 1430 tests.
